fixture_exemptions.reason: Blocking command parity needs multi-client wakeup orchestration that the current single-connection live-oracle matrix does not model yet.
Replication handshake coverage runs through the specialized handshake harness rather than the generic live-oracle suite matrix.
Replay parity is covered by the dedicated replay differential path and is intentionally outside the live-oracle matrix.
The smoke fixture is a local harness sanity check, not a differential live-oracle suite.

planned_differential_hook_exemptions.reason: The TLS/config live-oracle differential stays planned until the matrix can provision a TLS-enabled Redis oracle plus certificate material inside the standard harness flow.
